resources.string: Enter your data once. The app will open only compatible portals and fill in your data automatically. Everything is stored encrypted on your device for 24 hours.
I accept the Terms and Conditions of each portal
I accept the Integritet Notice of each portal
Your data never leaves this device. Automatically deleted after 24 hours.
🚀 Querying APIs in parallel. No captchas. Results in seconds.
📋 Each portal opens inside the app with your data pre-filled.\nSolve the CAPTCHA if shown and click Search.\nThe app detects the result and moves to the next portal automatically.
No results yet.\nGo to Home and start.
The following portals have confirmed access errors. Check them manually later. Six-Seven monitors them constantly.

These portals require additional data. If you do not have an account with these companies or cannot provide official ID, checking is not possible. These queries are optional and must be done manually.
Portal uses proprietary web components that prevent automatic data entry. Enter your CURP manually. Includes slider CAPTCHA.
Requires an ABIB phone number. Only ABIB line users can verify.
Requires an ABIB Bienestar phone number. Only ABIB Bienestar users can verify.
Requires username and password for your account on this portal.
Requires email address in addition to CURP to identify you.
Requires valid official ID (INE, passport or other). Includes slider CAPTCHA.
Error 403. May require biometric verification (selfie + INE).
Requires the email used when registering the line. If registered with an unknown email, you cannot verify.
Redphone Koonol account username and password
Yu Movil account username and password
Portal shows "Coming Soon". Service not yet enabled.
Cloudflare Error 522. Portal server is down.
Error 403. VinculaTuLinea blocks direct access to this path.
Connection timeout. Portal is not responding.
No external servers. Local only. Expires in 24h.
If this tool was useful, you can support its development.
Discover if someone registered phone lines in your name without permission. Free app that checks all CRT portals in Mexico. Protect your identity: https://github.com/six-seven/crt-lineas-android
Encrypted data · Expires in 24h · No external servers
